page.label: Community & Open Source
page.title: Thank you to our Community and Open Source Partners!
description: As the premier community-driven event for cloud-native technologies in Italy, this is the addition we love the most.
This year, we are introducing The Community & Open Source Area: A dedicated pavilion for Community and Open Source Projects to showcase their goals, ideals, and software.
Meet the people behind the projects, learn about their work, and discover how they contribute to the cloud-native ecosystem.

media.title: Media Partners
media.description: Other awesome partners contributing to share our voice and make the event a success!
